title: Biden: It was a 'mistake' to talk about 'bullseye' on Donald Trump

title: What religion is Trump's VP pick JD Vance?
shortDescription: Trump's running mate, JD Vance, is Catholic.

title: False claim video shows Trump rally shooting was 'staged' | Fact check
shortDescription: The Secret Service had already confirmed the shooting resulted in casualties by the time the Facebook post was shared on July 14.

title: And Trump's VP pick is...

title: Demonstrators outside RNC protest Trump, war in Gaza
shortDescription: Protestors gathered outside the RNC to make their voices heard on issues including supporting abortion rights and opposing the war in Gaza.

title: What is the net worth of JD Vance? A look at GOP VP pick's wealth
shortDescription: J.D. Vance is a venture capitalist and best-selling author. He also could be Republican Donald Trump's pick for VP. So how much is Vance worth?

title: Biden campaign pushes Trump running mate Vance to debate Kamala Harris
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris is "prepared" to debate Republican Donald Trump's new running mate, Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance, the Biden campaign says.

title: OnPolitics: Donald Trump selects JD Vance as running mate
shortDescription: Donald Trump selected Ohio Senator J.D. Vance on Monday to be his 2024 vice-presidential running mate.

shortDescription: A popular gun influencer said his team was shocked and confused that the Trump shooter wore his shirt on Saturday.

title: Donald Trump named Republican nominee
shortDescription: Donald Trump was officially named the nominee for president at the 2024 Republican National Convention.

title: Trump meets with RFK Jr. following assassination attempt
shortDescription: After meeting with Donald Trump, Robert F. Kennedy's press secretary wrote that the candidate will meet with Democratic party leaders as well.

title: No, 'The Simpsons' did not predict Trump rally shooting | Fact check
shortDescription: A cartoon image of Donald Trump in a casket has circulated online multiple times over the years but has never appeared on the show.

title: Altered image shows smiling agents surrounding Trump | Fact check
shortDescription: The image was doctored to change the facial expressions of the agents. In the original photo, they are not smiling.

title: Trump VP also-rans eye cabinet jobs - if he can beat Biden and the Dems
shortDescription: If he wins the White House, Trump would have to fill 15 Cabinet positions, each a consolation prize for the also-rans who didn't make the VP cut.

title: Trump shooter killed at scene, not arrested | Fact check

title: JD Vance picked to be Trump's vice-presidential running mate

title: Politics around weapon used in Trump assassination attempt remain divided
shortDescription: The AR-15 has grown as the subject of public scrutiny and political concern over the past decade for its use in multiple deadly shootings.

title: Sen. Marco Rubio told he will not be Donald Trump's running mate

title: Trump on a roll: Is the general election over before it begins?
